title: Vkaminski
compiled_truth: Vkaminski is an external contact at [AOL](companies/aol). Over the corpus period (1980-01-01 to 2002-01-30), Vkaminski sent 250 and received 3179 emails, totalling 3429 interactions. Top correspondents: [Vkamins](people/vkamins) (163), [J Kaminski](people/j-kaminski) (65), [Kamins](people/kamins) (12), [Vince Kaminski](people/vince-kaminski) (7), [Scrensh](people/scrensh) (5).
